title: Quantum secret sharing based on quantum codes
abstract:
Abstract
                  Quantum secret sharing has wide application prospects in quantum communication, quantum network and other fields. It can provide a secure and reliable information sharing method for multi-party communication. In this paper, we mainly study the connection mechanism between the quantum secret-sharing scheme and quantum error-correcting codes. Firstly, we give the necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of quantum error-correcting codes based on group algebra theory. Secondly, we give the corresponding quantum secret sharing scheme model with local quantum operation and classical communication capability can be constructed by any given quantum error-correcting codes. The advantage of this model is that the corresponding quantum secret-sharing scheme can be found for any quantum error-correcting code.
